Prototype Powertrain Bracket for Automotive Development

powertrain bracket / load path / assembly verification

IndustriesAutomotive
Part Functionpowertrain bracket / load path / assembly verification
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, aluminum or steel material matching, threaded holes and inspection reporting

Project Scenario

The bracket prototype helped the engineering team check mounting position, load path and local clearance before tooling decisions.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The prototype clarified machining risk and installation feedback for the next round of structural optimization.
